I'm pretty new too, so take this all with a grain of salt, but if you needed to get your keeper lvl up, it helped me a lot doing all those Lightless Realm Challenges.
- For the skull icon section, you can complete that challenge once a week to get some nice rewards
- The DNA icon also has a ton of little quick battles that you can get materials to lvl up your awakeners with and get lots of keeper XP
- Right below the DNA icon you should soon unlock something called Verbotem Covenant which has some very fast easy battles to get more XP and stuff to make your Awakeners better
- Every day I buy all the gnosis potions (the little vials that you use to level up Awakeners) from the exchange store / Rose Script section
- If you go Story Mode (where it says "Next") then go to the Psyche Deepdive section, you can play some short stories and get a nice posse at the end
- I'll do one or two battles for the current event (Carnal Desires) each day and that's given me a lot of XP too
